pinout.ui[0]: Weight bit 0 (from RP2040, valid during ACCUM)

pinout.ui[3]: Weight bit 3 (from RP2040, valid during ACCUM)

pinout.uio[1]: in_accum (high when RP2040 must present weight)
pinout.uio[5]: Synapse select bit 0 — syn_idx[0] (valid when in_accum=1)
pinout.uio[6]: Synapse select bit 1 — syn_idx[1] (valid when in_accum=1)
pinout.uio[7]: Synapse select bit 2 — syn_idx[2] (valid when in_accum=1)

projects.title: FinSec-1: AS-68M Fingerprint Verification ASIC
projects.author: A. Sriram, G. Lakshminarayanan, B. Lakshmi, T. N. Prabakar
projects.description: Hardware-only AS-68M fingerprint verification ASIC. Implements complete UART command protocol (VfyPwd, SetSysPara, GetImg, Img2Tz, Search) as a 14-state deterministic FSM. No MCU or CPU. DRC=0, LVS=0, Antenna=0, zero timing violations across 9 PVT corners, 1.153 mW.

pinout.ui[0]: uart_rx — UART data from AS-68M sensor TD pin 4, 57600 baud (double-flopped)
pinout.ui[1]: fp_touch — Finger-present from sensor ST pin 2 (double-flopped)
pinout.uo[0]: uart_tx — UART command output to sensor RD pin 5
pinout.uo[1]: match_out — HIGH 3s on verified fingerprint match
pinout.uo[2]: no_match_out — HIGH 3s when finger is not enrolled
pinout.uo[3]: error_out — HIGH on timeout or protocol error, cleared by rst_n
pinout.uo[4]: sensor_rdy — HIGH after VfyPwd ACK received from sensor
pinout.uo[5]: finger_det — Live synchronised mirror of fp_touch
pinout.uo[6]: uart_busy — HIGH during UART frame transmission
pinout.uo[7]: heartbeat — 1.5 Hz toggle from hb_cnt[25], ASIC alive indicator

projects.title: Trinity GF16 Dot Product Accelerator
projects.author: Dmitrii Vasilev · Trinity Stack
projects.description:
GF16 (Golden Float 16-bit, bias=31) dot product N=4. FPGA-validated at 323 MHz on XC7A100T.
Apache 2.0. Anchor theorem: phi^2 + phi^-2 = 3 (Trinity identity, 84-theorem Coq base in t27).
DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19227877. Provenance: gHashTag/trinity-fpga#19, R-SI compliance map in
gHashTag/trios assertions/igla_assertions.json. Step 1 of L-DPC3->L-DPC4->L-DPC5 silicon
roadmap toward TRL 7 silicon-validation for PhD defense 2026-06-15.

projects.title: EP Sensor v7 (symmetric in-place thicken, Zhao-compliant)
projects.author: Thomas Gilbert
projects.description: v7 = v2 baseline + PGS strip + symmetric DELTA=0.8 in-place spiral thicken with cap_mim keepout. Both spirals widened equally (11.6um vertical / 6.6um horizontal), preserving Zhao chiral EP symmetry. Q ~5.7 at 3 GHz, predicted to resolve cv-bits b4-b6.

pinout.ui[2]: b2 (80 fF, eps=0.022; lowest resolved point)
pinout.ui[3]: b3 (160 fF, eps=0.044; Zhao window lower edge)
pinout.ui[4]: b4 (320 fF, eps=0.088; within Zhao window)
pinout.ui[5]: b5 (640 fF, eps=0.176; within Zhao window)
pinout.ui[6]: b6 (1280 fF, eps=0.352; above Zhao window)
pinout.ua[0]: V1 (V1 LC tank; RF probe drive and observe at 50 ohm)
pinout.ua[1]: V2 (V2 LC tank; observe peak split)
